purpose: Determine whether the failed conventional CdTe quadratic Kane closure is caused by finite-radius contamination, a low-rank state-space defect, or broad missing matrix structure before generating any extended invariant basis or increasing computational depth.
claim_boundary: This gate localizes the failure of the conventional F,gamma1,gamma2,gamma3 matrix span in the unconverged static CdTe method smoke. It does not identify a unique missing invariant, validate the rejected quadratic parameter values, establish converged CdTe material parameters, or authorize deeper electronic-structure, phonon, HgTe, or alloy calculations.
